prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-SIFTINGMESHFREEMUST-4 Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Classifier Screen Set Soil Sifter, Coarse Combo (1/2, 1/4, 1/8 Mesh) Description: The ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Classifier Screens are a must-have for gold prospecting and mineral recovery. Utilizing our high-impact steel wire classifier sieves is one of the first steps in successful gold prospecting. The Classifier Soil Sifting Screens will aid your increase the amount of material you can run by separating unwanted coarse raw material into finer, manageable good material ready to wash in your gold pan or run through a sluice box.

Available in 9 different sizes for both fine and coarse material sifting, ensuring you'll be able to properly sift all size material. This set includes 1/2", 1/4" and 1/8" classifier screens.

Each soil classifying screen will fit over a standard 5 gallon bucket as well as a 14" gold pan and they are stackable, interlocking on top of each other to ensure that they will not slip or slide when used in conjunction with one another. Proper classification of material by size is the key to more efficient gold separation. This is true for roughing out your material, all the way to the final step of fine gold separation. Using a gold sifter screen is essential for gold panning, sluicing or running a high banking equally well.

Separating and processing your gold concentrates by size with a classifier makes gold recovery much more efficient and less labor intensive, is faster and a more effective, resulting in more gold. Search Terms: gold panning sluice box prospecting sediment sorting geology classifier screen for home garden worm compost sifter mineral pay dirt collection outdoor dry sifting hash extractor micron sieve pollen soil herb THCL press fine material Features: - 5 GALLON BUCKET CLASSIFIER SCREEN: Soil sifting pans are designed to interlock and stack on top of each other; will fit on top of a standard 3 or 5 gallon bucket and our 14 inch gold pans; Top Diameter: 13.25", Bottom Diameter: 11" - RUGGED WEATHERPROOF DESIGN: Constructed from high-impact durable ABS plastic with 304 stainless steel wire mesh; will not rust or corrode under normal wear - CLASSIFIER SIFTING SCREEN SIZE: 1/2", 1/4", and 1/8" - GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: Classifying your raw material down is imperative for successful gold recovery; sifting out large rocks and soil from your high-yielding pay dirt before working it through your gold pan or sluice box - MULTIPURPOSE SIFTING PAN SCREENS: Ideal for many different purposes and a wide range of materials; nothing is off limits with these classifier sifting screens === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Classifier Screen Set 1/2 1/4 1/8

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3-Pk Coarse Gold Panning Classifier Screen Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 3-Piece Stackable Mesh Set, Fits 5 Gallon Bucket And 14 Inch Gold Pan, Stainless Steel Wire, Prospecting And Sluice

openai.title_differentiation: Three Screen Sizes, Fits 3 Or 5 Gallon Buckets, 304 Stainless Steel Mesh, Stackable, Rust Resistant
